hero.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple apps. Manage your entire restaurant empire from a single, unified, high-performance interface.

features.subtitle: We've distilled a decade of restaurant expertise into a single, cohesive operating system.

ai_menu.title: AI Menu Optimization
ai_menu.description: Our neural networks analyze sales data to suggest the most profitable menu engineering strategies automatically.

global.title: Global Scalability
global.description: Scale from one food truck to a global empire with zero infrastructure friction.

staffing.title: Smart Staffing
staffing.description: Predictive scheduling based on historical traffic and weather patterns.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Grade
enterprise.description: The same security protocols used by global banks, now for your kitchen.

pricing.subtitle: Predictable pricing for every stage of your restaurant's lifecycle.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for boutiques and small cafes.

cta.subtitle: Stop settling for yesterday's tools. Experience the platform that's redefining what's possible in hospitality.

footer.slogan: We're not just a platform. We're the infrastructure for the next generation of dining experiences.

bundle_details.subtitle: You're one step away from joining the most advanced dining network in the world.
